prompt: Closing Inventory = Units On Hand at the last date of the current period, summed across products/stores in context, without double-counting across days. Grounded in Retail-v2 (daily Inventory snapshot).

assertions.text: Recognizes the value is semi-additive over time: takes the LAST available date's snapshot rather than summing across all days in the period
Uses LASTDATE / LASTNONBLANK (e.g. CALCULATE(SUM('Inventory'[Units On Hand]), LASTDATE('Date'[Date])) or LASTNONBLANK on the snapshot date)
Sums Units On Hand across products and stores at that last date (additive across non-time dimensions)
References only existing columns ('Inventory'[Units On Hand], 'Date'[Date], snapshot date)
Explains why a plain SUM over the whole period double-counts (each day re-states the on-hand balance)
